questions.text: Provide a brief description of your interest in the matter, including any commercial relationships your business or organisation has with Primary Wave and/or Kobalt.

Outline any concerns regarding the competitive impact of the Acquisition on the supply of music publishing services to artists and songwriters or the distribution of copyright musical works in Australia. Are Primary Wave and Kobalt close competitors for either of these services, and what alternatives are available?

Outline any concerns regarding whether the Acquisition will provide Primary Wave with the ability and/or incentive to restrict a competitor’s access to music publishing and royalty collection services supplied by Kobalt’s royalty collection business ‘amra’.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
